products.svg: <svg class="product-image-svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><circle cx="50" cy="30" r="14" fill="none" stroke="#ffd700" stroke-width="3" filter="drop-shadow(0 0 3px #ffd700)"/><line x1="50" y1="44" x2="50" y2="66" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="3"/><circle cx="50" cy="74" r="8" fill="#ffaa00" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>

products.name: Premium Poster Collection
products.description: Heavyweight glossy posters bundle depicting breathtaking views of key multiverse hubs.
products.svg: <svg class="product-image-svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect x="32" y="24" width="46" height="60" fill="#1b1220" stroke="#cc00ff" stroke-width="2"/><rect x="22" y="16" width="46" height="60" fill="none" stroke="#00f0ff" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.6"/><circle cx="45" cy="46" r="8" fill="#cc00ff" opacity="0.8"/></svg>

products.name: Mega Vinyl Sticker Pack
products.description: A 50-piece pack of ultra-durable, waterproof holographic vinyl decals representing multiple dimensions.
products.svg: <svg class="product-image-svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><circle cx="40" cy="40" r="15" fill="#ff0055" opacity="0.8"/><circle cx="60" cy="55" r="18" fill="#00f0ff" opacity="0.8"/><polygon points="46,65 54,65 50,56" fill="#ffd700"/></svg>

products.name: Holographic Phone Case
products.description: Shockproof phone case with a dynamic holographic shifting design that glows in dim lighting.
products.svg: <svg class="product-image-svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><rect x="32" y="18" width="36" height="64" rx="8" fill="#111" stroke="#00f0ff" stroke-width="2.5" filter="drop-shadow(0 0 4px #00f0ff)"/><ellipse cx="50" cy="50" rx="8" ry="16" fill="none" stroke="#ff0055" stroke-width="1.5"/><rect x="38" y="24" width="6" height="4" rx="1" fill="#333"/></svg>

products.name: Cosmic Sling Backpack
products.description: Ergonomic water-resistant sling bag with hidden anti-theft pockets and an external USB port.
